phases.intro_dialogue: Judge Luma narrows the old lantern court pattern.

doctor_sushan_boss.bullet_legend: Pattern Serum lanes, fluorescent sweeps, and failed-contingency fireworks.
doctor_sushan_boss.pacing_note: Clinical order breaks into readable chaos as each phase invalidates Sushan's control model.

phases.intro_dialogue: Sushan launches Pattern Serum syringes through hospital lanes.
phases.readability_hint: Cyan monitors identify every active serum lane before the syringes fire.

patterns.safe_hint: Serum lanes flash cyan before firing. Hold the unlit lane.

phases.intro_dialogue: The ward lights sweep the battle box in a perfect repeating schedule.
phases.readability_hint: The fluorescent tubes blink twice before their sweep and pause.

patterns.safe_hint: Hospital lights sweep twice, then pause. Cross during the pause.

phases.intro_dialogue: The serum fails and fireworks scramble the bullet box.
phases.readability_hint: Each firework color announces which familiar pattern returns.

patterns.safe_hint: Each firework color recalls a familiar pattern. Read the flash first.

mitta_boss.bullet_legend: Festival notes, pageant curtains, and spotlight sweeps.
mitta_boss.pacing_note: Mitta's fight is a three-act stage show whose rhythm remains readable before each spectacle lands.

phases.intro_dialogue: Mitta turns Aeon Festival lights into rhythm attacks.
phases.readability_hint: Stage bulbs pulse on the attack beat; the dark count is safe movement time.

patterns.safe_hint: Notes pulse on the beat. Move on the dark count.

phases.intro_dialogue: Mitta drops the pageant curtains in alternating columns.
phases.readability_hint: Curtain shadows identify the next blocked column.

patterns.safe_hint: Curtain shadows mark the fall. Change columns after each drop.

phases.intro_dialogue: The stage erupts into beams, notes, and bitter spectacle.
phases.readability_hint: The applauding side lights first; move behind the spotlight sweep.

patterns.safe_hint: Spotlights sweep from the applauding side. Follow their trailing edge.
